title: Rate-Limited API
description: Build any CRUD API with rate limiting. POST /api/items creates items (name required). GET /api/items lists all. Apply rate limiting: max 5 requests per minute. The 6th request within a minute should return 429.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Items table:
  name, required

# Your endpoints here
# Hint: rate limit 5 per minute
